name: Waveshare CH32V003 I/O Expander
description: The Waveshare IO CH32V003 component allows you to use the Waveshare I/O expansion modules based on the CH32V003 microcontroller in ESPHome. It uses the [I²C Bus](https://esphome.io/components/i2c) for communication.

config_entries.label: Address
config_entries.description: The I²C address of the expander. Defaults to `0x24`.

config_entries.label: I2C ID
config_entries.description: The I²C Bus ID if you have multiple I²C buses.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The id to use for this component.
